sentence: Our mission is to accelerate the world’s transition to sustainable energy Impact Report 2024 Building the economy of the future Impact Report 2024 Management Impact Report 2024 Board of Directors overview Impact Report 2024 Sustainability assessment Most Impact Impact Report 2024 Final Assessment Findings Least Impact Impact Report 2024 Impact Report 2024 Managing climate risk Impact Report 2024 Physical climate risk assessment Impact Report 2024 Human rights are core to our mission In 2024, our customers avoided releasing nearly 32 million metric tons of CO2e into the atmosphere Impact Report 2024 Our Robotaxi network will further accelerate our mission Emissions per Mile Cybercab / Robotaxi* Model 3 / Model Y Vehicles Impact Report 2024 The more products we deliver, the faster we accelerate our mission Tesla VW Group Geely Auto Group BMW Group Hyundai Motor Stellantis SAIC R-N-M Alliance Impact Report 2024 In 2024, we delivered around 1.8 million vehicles and deployed 31.4 GWh of energy storage globally Impact Report 2024 Premature deaths from air pollution are avoidable Unhealthy (For sensitive groups) Impact Report 2024 Each Tesla vehicle on the road avoids around 35 tons of CO2e EV Emissions Avoided Over Time EV Emissions Cumulative Emissions Avoided Impact Report 2024 We use real-world data to measure our emissions Impact Report 2024 Megapack 2 XL Emissions Impact Over Time Cumulative emissions avoided (t) Megapack paired with renewables lowers grid emissions In addition to providing grid stability and reliability, Megapack allows low-cost, low-emission energy from renewable sources to be used during peak consumption hours, replacing expensive, high-emission energy from fossil fuel generators.
justification: Contains multiple specific numbers: 32 million metric tons CO2e avoided, 1.8 million vehicles delivered, 31.4 GWh energy storage deployed, 35 tons CO2e avoided per vehicle

sentence: For this case study, we evaluated the median expected CO2e emissions avoided in the U.S. in addition to CAISO (California Independent System Operator) where a notable portion of our global fleet operates.
justification: References specific geographic scope (U.S. and CAISO) for quantitative CO2e emissions avoided evaluation

sentence: We assume a project size of 150 MW (which is typical for utilityscale deployments) and that Megapack units are used primarily for energy-shifting.
justification: Contains specific number: project size of 150 MW assumed for utility-scale deployments

sentence: Ultimately, the amount of CO2e emissions avoided by Megapack will depend on the mix of fossil fuels and renewables on the grid.
justification: Discusses uncertainty and dependency on grid mix variables affecting CO2e emissions avoided outcomes

sentence: When taking different grid mixes into account across the U.S., we expect median CO2e emissions avoided to be about 80,000 tons, while in CAISO (which has more renewables) we expect 116,000 tons of CO2e emissions to be avoided during the lifetime of a 150 MW deployment.
justification: Contains specific numbers: median 80,000 tons CO2e avoided across U.S., 116,000 tons in CAISO, 150 MW deployment lifetime

sentence: Impact Report 2024 Vehicle lifecycle analysis glossary Impact Report 2024 Vehicle lifecycle analysis glossary Model 3/Model Y* Scenarios Lifecycle Emissions Assumptions Personal Use Solar Charged Personal Use Average Premium ICE Vehicle Emissions per mile if Model 3/Model Y principally charged at home using a solar system and energy storage Global Analysis Emissions per mile if Model 3/Model Y principally charged at home from the grid Based on an average of mid-size premium sedans and mid-size premium crossover SUVs, with a real-world fuel economy of 24.9 MPG Lifecycle emissions using solar panels and Powerwall exclusively to charge Model 3/Model Y adds emissions to the manufacturing phase and reduces use-phase emissions to as low as zero.
justification: Contains specific number: real-world fuel economy of 24.9 MPG for ICE vehicle comparison; references lifecycle emissions metrics in gCO2e/mi across multiple regions

sentence: No additional renewable energy capacity on the grid during the life of the vehicle—the shape of the renewable energy adoption curve is still up for debate.
justification: Discusses uncertainty about renewable energy adoption curve shape and assumptions about grid capacity

sentence: Marc Asano, Hawaiian Electric, “An Innovative Figure 1: Real power output of the Kapolei facility in response to a frequency deviation in February 2024. (1) Following an unplanned disconnection of one of the generators on Oahu, the frequency of the grid starts falling.
justification: Contains specific date (February 2024) and numbered sequence of events with measurable frequency threshold references

sentence: The Kapolei facility's virtual inertia reacts to the rate-of-change-of-frequency slowing the rate of the change of frequency. (2) Grid frequency drops below 59.4 Hz, which is the threshold set to trigger a fast frequency response at the site, resulting in the facility's injection of additional power and the arrest in the decline in system frequency. (3) Having provided a net 70 MW over the four second event, the battery quickly settles at steady state power as the grid frequency is restored back to nominal.
justification: Contains specific numbers: 59.4 Hz threshold, 70 MW net output, four-second event duration, and measurable frequency response metrics
